tree.name: D'Angelo Russell
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/DAL/CHA): WAS received AD, Hardy, Russell, Exum from DAL. WAS sent Middleton, AJ Johnson, Bagley, Branham, 2 1sts, 3 2nds.
tree.note: Shared cost with Anthony Davis — guard from Dallas

assetsGivenUp.name: Khris Middleton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: WAS sent Kuzma, PBJ, 2025 2nd, 2026 2nd to MIL for Middleton, AJ Johnson, 2028 1st. See was-anthony-davis.json for full chain.
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with AD — 3x All-Star from Milwaukee
